since_last: 68% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.05%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC -0.07% · Gold +0.17% · Nasdaq100 +1.14%. 68% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.05%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.05%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +7.39%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +7.39%, INTC +4.81%, AMBA +4.71%, MU +4.19%, BIDU +4.04%. Laggards: NOW -4.03%, ADBE -3.24%, INTU -3.03%, SAP -2.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.14% at $122.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
